title: Sqlitelogictest: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicated rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), score FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DISTINCT score, name FROM test_table WHERE score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY score;
CREATE TABLE another_table(ref_id INT, description TEXT, CONSTRAINT fk_ref_id FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO another_table(ref_id, description) VALUES(1, 'Top Performer'), (2, 'Good Performer'), (1, 'Top Performer');
key_bug_features: Aggregation query with distinct clause produces duplicates
